5th consecutive - speech at latest alert beep

large headache and tinnitus turned up - subject report
large headache and tinnitus turned up - subject report

symptoms.description: Police observed near house. Phone left inside. Pretended to leave, went to backyard. Heard large entity fleeing through woods behind property.
symptoms.note: Phone inside = no cell-based tracking during observation

symptoms.description: Officer description: heavyset male, not 300lbs, clean-cut brown goatee. Vehicle: black Ford Explorer, SPD local city police, black decals on side (low-visibility markings). Subject approached officer and asked if everything was alright. Suspected second person (partner) may have been in woods behind property.
symptoms.note: Subject initiated contact with officer. Officer presence + woods activity occurred while phone was inside house.

symptoms.description: Officer response when asked if everything alright: said he was just monitoring the neighborhood. Appeared surprised when subject approached and spoke to him. Subject then drove away.
symptoms.note: Unmarked-style low-vis Explorer + woods activity + surprised reaction to contact is inconsistent with routine patrol.

symptoms.description: Subject states: never seen this officer before, never seen any police just monitoring the neighborhood like that. Unusual and unprecedented for this area.
symptoms.note: First-time observation of static police surveillance at this location strengthens anomaly.
